utterances.speaker: Dana
utterances.text: I am sorry Chandler , you know you are such a sweet guy and I , I do not want to hurt you .

emotion_cause.span: 1_I do not want to hurt you .

utterances.speaker: Dana
utterances.text: Oh , I wish there was something I can do to make you feel better .

emotion_cause.span: 2_I wish there was something I can do to make you feel better .
2_I wish there was something I can do to make you feel better .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Well , it just hurts so bad . I uh

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Well , maybe there is one thing you can do .

emotion_cause.span: 7_maybe there is one thing you can do .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Well , I umm , I mean this is just off the top of my head now , umm but I have this friend .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: This actor friend and he would kill me if he thought I was doing this umm , but umm would it be possible for him to get an audition for your movie say on Thursday ?

emotion_cause.span: 10_he would kill me if he thought I was doing this

utterances.speaker: Dana
utterances.text: Absolutely ! But you ... you would really feel better about me rejecting you if your actor friend can audition for my movie ?

emotion_cause.span: 11_you ... you would really feel better about me rejecting you if your actor friend can audition for my movie ?

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Well , the heart wants what it wants . I will see you later .
